raw_response_text:
<features>
- The flower has six petals.
- The petals are light pink with darker pink veins.
- The center of the flower has many thin stamens.
- The flower is surrounded by green leaves and a dark brown background.
</features>
<kb>
- IF a flower has six petals that are light pink with darker pink veins and a center with many thin stamens, THEN the class is 81.
- IF a flower has yellow petals and a green stem, THEN the class is 14.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows a flower with six petals that are light pink with darker pink veins and a center with many thin stamens. This matches the description for class 81. The flower is not yellow, so it does not match class 14.
</rule_check>
<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- The flower has six petals.
- The petals are yellow.
- The flower has a distinct central structure with dark markings.
- The flower has long, green leaves.
- There are buds visible.
</features>
<kb>
- IF a flower has six petals, is predominantly purple and white, and has a central stamen structure, THEN the class is 81.
- IF a flower has six petals, is predominantly yellow, and has a distinct central structure with dark markings, THEN the class is 14.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows a flower with six petals that are predominantly yellow. It also has a distinct central structure with dark markings, similar to the examples classified as 14. Therefore, the rule for class 14 is best satisfied.
</rule_check>
<response>14</response>
